title: ClubNub
description:
A ClubNub Pack designed for singleplayer and/or use on the official ClubNub SMP Server.

The pack is a vanilla-like experience with emphasis on building, new blocks, decorations, farming and custom NPCs.
body:
![ClubNub Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c475f9210f72579c280ef49d807d5f8b287264b_0.webp)

ClubNub Mod pack for use with single player and/or the official ClubNub SMP Server. 

The pack is a vanilla-like experience with emphasis on smooth gameplay, optimized client, building, new blocks, decorations, farming and custom NPCs.

[Simple YT Short of the pack](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/s1SwONjvWWw)
